name: Global Graphics PLC
summary: Global Graphics PLC, together with its subsidiaries, develops software and hardware technology solutions for digital inkjet printing, and type design and development in the United Kingdom, rest of Europe, North America, and Asia. The company operates through Software, Printhead Solutions, and Fonts segments. The company offers Harlequin RIP, a software raster image processor, which converts text and images into printable form; ScreenPro, a software engine used to enhance inkjet image quality and compatibility with printing industry workflow; PrintFlat, a closed-loop calibration tool to enhance print uniformity and to reduce artifacts of the inkjet printing process; Fundamentals, a toolkit for building digital front end; and Mako, a multi-platform software development kit for building custom workflows. It also supplies drive electronics for industrial inkjet printing, digital typefaces, and font technology; and provides technical support services for computer software. The company sells its products to original equipment manufacturers, distributors, and system integrators. Global Graphics PLC was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Cambridge, the United Kingdom.
